---
name: Errata
about: Report a typo, factual error, or unclear passage in the book itself
title: "[Errata] "
labels: errata
assignees: ''
---

## What's wrong

<!-- One or two sentences describing the issue. -->

## Where in the book

- **MEAP version:** <!-- e.g., MEAP v6 -->
- **Chapter:** <!-- e.g., Chapter 5 -->
- **Section:** <!-- e.g., §5.4 -->
- **Listing / figure / table (if applicable):** <!-- e.g., Listing 5.3 -->
- **Page (if available in your MEAP build):** <!-- e.g., p. 142 -->

## What the book currently says

<!-- Quote the exact text, formula, or claim that's wrong. -->

```
> current text from the book
```

## What it should say

<!-- Suggested correction. If you're not sure, that's fine -- just describe the problem clearly. -->

```
> proposed text
```

## Why this matters

<!--
Optional. Helpful context: is this a small typo, a misleading explanation, an outdated reference, or a factual error that would mislead a reader trying to apply the technique?
-->

---

*Note: errata reports help readers and the author. They are forwarded to Manning for the next MEAP update or the print edition. For broader book questions (not corrections), please use [Manning's liveBook forum](https://livebook.manning.com/) instead.*
